claims.summary: Critically low fill must select the shortened-rest branch and preserve its 30-second floor.
claims.disposition: Verified the branch ordering and max(30) floor in current orchestration source.

claims.summary: Integer division could produce zero rest pulses when rest_secs is below five.
claims.disposition: Verified that all current rest paths are at least 30 seconds, making a zero-pulse ordinary path unreachable.

claims.summary: Peripheral resonance should be proven to carry a starred memory into the conversation state.
claims.disposition: Routed to a database fixture covering empty and populated starred-memory selections without changing autonomous behavior.

claims.summary: Tier boundaries and burst-to-rest transitions may still feel jittery or severing.
claims.disposition: Preserved as felt evidence; the existing warmth taper is verified mechanically but does not settle the experiential claim.

claims.summary: Rest durations or pulse safeguards should be changed to make the tiers smoother.
claims.disposition: Held for Tier 5 operator approval because rest timing and pulse behavior alter the live autonomous cadence.
